description: dump the page's console messages, optionally filtered by level (read-only)
rules: read-only — reads captured console messages, mutates nothing
runs `playwright-cli console [PW_LEVEL]` via the bundled npx wrapper
PW_LEVEL filters (e.g. warning, error); empty dumps all levels
degrades gracefully: records when a live browser is not requested/available
usage: Optional PW_LEVEL filters by level (e.g. warning); optional PW_SESSION isolates the session. Output: console.json.
limitation: Needs npx + @playwright/cli + an already-open page to read real console output; offline it records the unreachable state and still emits valid output.
